_comment: Fill in 'providers' with your brand's provider name(s) EXACTLY as they appear on mein-now.de (the 'Anbieter'/Bildungsanbieter field). Matching is case-insensitive substring, so 'GFN' will match 'GFN GmbH'. Fill 'ranking_keywords' with the search terms prospective students type; the crawler records where your courses rank for each.

keyword_tracker._comment: Used by keyword_tracker.py. Keywords are read from keywords.txt. top_n = how many top results define the visible 'first page' for competitor-share; rank_scan_depth = how deep to scan to find your best rank; top_competitors = how many providers to record per keyword; discovery_max = how many auto-discovered candidate keywords to test.
